title: ECTS Payment System for Students Extending Their Term
content:
ECTS Payment System for Students Extending Their Term

It is the automation system in which undergraduate and associate degree students who have completed the normal period of study (sixth grade in the Faculty of Medicine, fifth grade in the Faculty of Dentistry) until the end of the second year in the associate degree programs of the normal education period, where they will complete the financial registration renewals by entering the number of ECTS they should receive in the fall and spring semesters.

Click here to apply for a term extension.
